config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.ac: Access Token for connecting to the WebSocket server when using the OneBot protocol.
config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.al: Whether to automatically approve friend requests when using the OneBot protocol.
Whether to automatically accept group invitations when using the OneBot protocol.
config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.en: Whether to enable temp sessions when using the OneBot Protocol.
Whether to enable self-message monitoring when using the OneBot protocol.
config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.ho: The address of Aiocqhttp WebSocket main server. (The Onebot protocol client should use the reverse Websocket method to connect)
config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.in: Cooldown in seconds for sending proactive messages.
config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.li: When using the OneBot protocol, the response emoji ID attached to the message when message processing fails. For details of emoji ID, see: https://bot.q.qq.com/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/emoji/model.html#Emoji
config.comments.config.adapter_onebot.ty: When using the OneBot protocol, the response emoji ID attached to the message when processing the message. For details of emoji ID, see: https://bot.q.qq.com/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/emoji/model.html#Emoji
